layers.name: background_canvas
layers.description: The light, off-white textured paper serving as the base canvas for the ink painting, showing subtle variations in tone and a traditional aesthetic.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A textured, off-white rice paper canvas, subtle variations in tone, traditional Chinese ink painting style, full canvas.

layers.name: distant_mountains
layers.description: Majestic, rugged mountains rendered with dark, heavy ink washes, appearing in the far background, creating a sense of depth and grandeur.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Majestic, rugged mountains in traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, dark heavy ink, appearing in the far background, on a transparent background.

layers.name: mist_and_haze
layers.description: Ethereal, soft white and light grey mist and atmospheric haze, creating depth and obscuring parts of the distant mountains and midground landscape, characteristic of traditional Chinese painting.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Ethereal, soft white and light grey mist and atmospheric haze, traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, creating depth and obscuring elements, on a transparent background.

layers.name: midground_landscape
layers.description: Rolling hills, a winding river with waterfalls, a narrow path, and scattered trees, rendered with lighter ink washes and subtle green hues, forming the midground of the landscape.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Rolling hills, a winding river with waterfalls, a narrow path, and scattered trees, traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, lighter ink washes and subtle green hues, forming the midground, on a transparent background.

layers.name: central_hill_and_pavilion
layers.description: A prominent central hill with a small, traditional pavilion nestled among large, gnarled pine trees, rendered with detailed ink strokes and green accents, serving as a focal point.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A prominent central hill with a small, traditional pavilion nestled among large, gnarled pine trees, traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, detailed ink strokes and green accents, on a transparent background.

layers.name: calligraphy_and_seals
layers.description: Vertical Chinese calligraphy text and two red square seals in the upper right corner, adding cultural context and the artist's signature to the artwork.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Vertical Chinese calligraphy text and two red square seals, traditional Chinese ink painting style, in the upper right corner, on a transparent background.
